description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 12 hrs 50 mins of coding time, averaging 4 hrs 8 mins per day across 5 projects. His work was split mostly between Other (36%), Java (32%), Markdown (15%), and TypeScript (9%). No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded in the fetched activity.
